commitMessage:
Merge pull request #3 from skarumbu/feat/gpt-5-mini-allowed-model

feat: allow gpt-5-mini as a run-bot model override

content.summary: Stores and serves AI-generated feature ideas in Azure Table Storage. Accepts browser JWT tokens via EasyAuth for read access and an X-Ideas-Key machine write-key for automated writes. Exposes endpoints to list and create ideas, manage projects, and trigger the ideas-bot Container App Job. Projects now support a single repository string instead of a list.
content.description: Azure Functions app that stores and serves feature ideas in Table Storage. Supports two auth modes: browser JWT tokens via EasyAuth for read access, and an X-Ideas-Key machine write-key for automated writes. Exposes a trigger endpoint for the ideas-bot.
features: PATCH /api/projects/{id} — updates project metadata, including associated repository, supports both EasyAuth JWT authentication and X-Ideas-Key machine write-key for access
Supports bot-managed fields, including 'bot_status', 'bot_pr_url', 'bot_error', and the newly added 'bot_blocked_by' for cross-repo dependency tracking

architecture.overview: HTTP-triggered Azure Functions backed by Table Storage. EasyAuth handles browser auth transparently at the Azure layer — no auth code in the application. A separate machine key enables automation (ideas-bot, external scripts) to write ideas without user credentials.
keyPoints: PATCH /projects/{id} endpoint updates project metadata, including the 'repo' field stored as a single string in Table Storage, now supports machine key authentication alongside user authentication
Backward compatibility: existing entities with old 'repos' JSON list have their first entry promoted to the 'repo' field on read
New 'bot_blocked_by' field added to support tracking cross-repo dependencies, integrated into the bot-managed fields alongside 'bot_status', 'bot_pr_url', and 'bot_error'

dataFlow.label: Bot updates idea status
sublines: Updates 'bot_status' field in the ideas table
Adds 'bot_blocked_by' field for cross-repo dependency tracking

designDocs.title: ADR: Per-Idea Status Updates
designDocs.description: Adds a threaded updates log to each idea, backed by a new Azure Table Storage table and a detail slide-over panel in the frontend.
